title: Different assignees in subitems and each of them could see only the assigned subitem
excerpt:
Hello! 
I would like to have the option to assign different people in an item.

And each assigned person to be able to see only his/her assigned subi…

posts.author: p.apostolidis (Paschalis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!
I would like to have the option to assign different people in an item.
Then to assign a different person to a specific subitem of this item.
And each assigned person to be able to see only his/her assigned subitem and not the other subitems assigned to other people.
Is this possible?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Which product and tier do you have? Ie Work Management, CRM?
